title: 16 to 19 funding uplift: survey for education providers
body: "Following the 13 July 2023 funding uplift announcement, allocations were used to address priorities as providers saw fit, including teacher recruitment and retention challenges.  The survey aims to identify emerging perceptions of impact from 2023 and 2024 16 to 19 funding allocations. Topics covered in the report include:   funding allocation status how funding was used, and the perceived impacts of the funding   The survey was issued in February 2024. 128 providers completed the survey. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
